Harvest Haven

Welcome to Harvest Haven! Manage your small farm through the seasons. Plant and harvest crops, manage your energy wisely, and build up your farming skills. Each day you have limited energy to work - use it to till soil, plant seeds, water crops, and harvest when ready. Crops grow over multiple days and must be watered daily. Advance through seasons to unlock new crop varieties and watch your farm flourish. Reach the target harvest count to win!

Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character around the farm | Space: Interact - Till soil, plant seeds, water crops, or harvest | Z: Switch between different seed types | Shift: Speed boost (costs extra energy) | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart (from game over screen)
